mapper.insert:
SELECT SMS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO /* /sms/addKakaoNoti : McpSmsMapper.insertKakaoNoti */ MSG_QUEUE ( MSEQ,
SUBJECT ,
MSG_TYPE, DSTADDR, CALLBACK, TEXT, EXPIRETIME, REQUEST_TIME, OPT_ID, TEXT2, K_TEMPLATE_CODE, K_NEXT_TYPE, SENDER_KEY ) VALUES ( #{SMS_SEQ, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{I_SUBJECT},
#{I_MSG_TYPE}, #{I_CTN}, #{I_CALLBACK}, #{I_MSG}, 7200, SYSDATE, 'MCP', #{I_MSG}, #{I_TEMPLATE_CD}, #{I_NEXT_TYPE}, #{I_SENDER_KEY} )

SELECT AM2X_SUBMIT_SEQ.NEXTVAL_SMS FROM DUAL
SELECT AM2X_SUBMIT_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO /* /sms/addNewSms : McpSmsMapper.insertNewSms */
AM2X_SUBMIT_SMS
AM2X_SUBMIT
( MSG_ID,
SUBJECT ,
MSG_TYPE, SCHEDULE_TIME, SUBMIT_TIME, MESSAGE, CALLBACK_NUM, RCPT_DATA, K_ADFLAG, RESERVED01, RESERVED02, RESERVED03 ) VALUES ( #{SMS_SEQ, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{I_SUBJECT},
#{I_MSG_TYPE}, NVL(#{SCHEDULE_TIME}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{I_MSG}, #{I_CALLBACK}, #{I_CTN}, 'N', 'MCP', #{RESERVED02}, #{RESERVED03} )
mapper.select:
SELECT /* /sms/qStackNewCnt : McpSmsMapper.selectQstackNewCount */ COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT RCPT_DATA, SCHEDULE_TIME
FROM AM2X_SUBMIT_LOG_SMS
FROM AM2X_SUBMIT_LOG
WHERE RCPT_DATA = #{phoneNum} AND MSG_TYPE = 1 AND TO_DATE(SCHEDULE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') > SYSDATE - #{limitMin}/60/24
UNION ALL
SELECT RCPT_DATA, SCHEDULE_TIME
FROM AM2X_SUBMIT_SMS
FROM AM2X_SUBMIT
WHERE RCPT_DATA = #{phoneNum} AND MSG_TYPE = 1 AND TO_DATE(SCHEDULE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') > SYSDATE - #{limitMin}/60/24 )
